subcodes.first_line: Say: O God, my Lord, my Goal and my Adored One! Thou seest Thy servant who hath sought shelter beneath the canopies of Thy grandeur and hath become [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل اللهم یا الهی و مقصودی و معبودی تری عبدک استظل فی ظل قباب عظمتک و یکون
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for opponents; enemies of the Faith, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
